testcase.name: completeEmployeeFlow

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1402, 491). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.56) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [e6e1e4e3d96de363e3e80cb4d4723fa7, clickElement {id=f.15154C3E81E54F955DA013146E59DA2D.d.743AC533333073ED7D85E10B841BBFF5.e.105}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.56, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.56 (b28eac7a1a97..., userDataDir: C:\Users\BHAVYA~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57329}, goog:processID: 28088, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57329/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.56, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (e6e1e4e3d96de363e3e80cb4d4723fa7)] -> xpath: //button[@type='submit']] Session ID: e6e1e4e3d96de363e3e80cb4d4723fa7
